name: curriculum-advantage-imitation-discrimination
description: Generalized curriculum advantage mechanism for cross-domain reasoning tasks using imitation-to-discrimination learning
paperTitle: From Imitation to Discrimination: Curriculum Advantage
content:
## From Imitation to Discrimination: Curriculum Advantage

### Core Concept

This skill implements techniques from paper arXiv:2512.02580 for improving agent reasoning, adaptation, and decision-making in complex tasks.

### Implementation

See paper for implementation details: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.02580

### Practical Guidance

Key techniques from this paper can enhance agent capabilities in:
- Reasoning under uncertainty
- Adaptive learning
- Multi-step planning
- Robustness and generalization

Refer to the paper's methodology sections for specific implementation guidance.
